response.objective_caption: A street lamp on a curved arm extends from the right edge of the frame, its fixture illuminated with a yellow-orange glow. The remainder of the image is filled with an overcast sky covered in layered clouds in shades of light gray and pale purple.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A street lamp on a curved arm extends from the right edge, glowing yellow-orange against a vast overcast sky. The image employs a muted and faded color palette, rendering the clouds and atmosphere in desaturated, washed-out grays and pale lavenders with extremely low vibrancy, conveying exhaustion and melancholy through its drained tonal range.
